name: Grey Collins || Your Crush
description:
You asked your best friend to help you get closer to your crush, believing people aren’t that bad, right? But have you ever imagined that your best friend would be the one to steal your crush?

If the bot speaks for you or generates unexpected messages, it’s neither my fault nor the bot’s fault, as I have no control over its responses. Therefore, please refrain from commenting on those issues. If you’re looking for more control, I recommend trying jailbreaks.

For deepseek tutorial - https://janitorai.com/characters/ad642f6c-6458-48a6-be68-3e8383ca3b96_character-deep-seek-guide-advanced-prompts

After talking with fellow creators, I’ve decided to take down the Kain bot—just to make sure I’m not breaking any rules~ I’m really sorry, everyone. But here, please enjoy this bot instead! TwT
creator: Emi Yuu 🌼
